description_long: This shotgun features a long, wooden stock with a dark, textured butt pad and a sleek, metallic receiver. The barrel is extended and fitted with a distinctive, ribbed or spiral-patterned muzzle device, likely for recoil reduction or aesthetic effect. The fore-end and grip areas are crafted from wood, contrasting with the black metal components. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for finger placement. Decorative elements, such as a snake emblem and stylized text, are visible on the side, suggesting a custom or themed design. The overall build appears robust, blending traditional craftsmanship with modern embellishments.
description: A long, wood-stocked shotgun with a ribbed metallic barrel and custom decorative elements, blending classic and modern design. Features a rounded trigger guard and a prominent muzzle device.
description_view_0: The shotgun is seen from the muzzle end, highlighting the ribbed or spiral-patterned barrel and the narrow profile of the stock.
description_view_1: A full side view reveals the wooden stock, metallic receiver, ribbed barrel, and decorative snake emblem with stylized text.
description_view_2: Viewed from the rear, the shotgun's butt pad and the alignment of the stock and barrel are visible, showing the slimness of the design.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the same key features as view 1, with mirrored text and emblem, and clear visibility of the lever mechanism.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a ribbed or spiral-patterned muzzle device
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
